text: My payment failed twice after clicking a recommended product. Never had this before.
App is loading way slower than usual. Takes forever to get to my dashboard. Started today.
Payment failed when I tried to buy a recommended item. Tried 3 times. Just gave up.
I keep getting a 'Something went wrong' error on the recommendations page. Very frustrating.
Payment declined again!! This is the 2nd day in a row. I'm going to cancel if this isn't fixed.
@PurpleMerit your app is broken. Payments not working since the update. Switching to competitor.
Updated yesterday and now the app is slow and my payment keeps failing. 1 star until fixed.
Error: 'Recommendation service unavailable' every morning around 9am. Consistent issue.
App is noticeably slower. Pages take 5-8 seconds to load. Used to be instant. Please fix.
Payment failed. I verified my card is fine. Third failed attempt this week. Considering cancelling.
Is @PurpleMerit down? Can't complete any purchases. #broken #fail
CANCELLED my subscription today. Payment has failed 4 times. No communication from support either.
Recommendation service error keeps appearing. It blocks the whole screen. Can't dismiss it easily.
Why is everything so slow? The app used to load in 1-2 seconds. Now it's 8-10 seconds on a good wifi.
@PurpleMerit I've been a customer for 3 years. This update broke payments. Extremely disappointed.
I just want to pay for my order! Why is the payment screen crashing? This is basic functionality!
Three friends also reported the same payment issue. It's not just me. Something is seriously wrong.
Downgraded to 1 star. Payment failures are totally unacceptable. Reverting until this is fixed.
App just crashed while I was in the middle of checkout via a recommendation. Lost my cart. Awful experience.
@PurpleMerit this is embarrassing. Payment failures + slow app for a week. No status update?
Cancelled. The new feature is not worth the broken payments and sluggish app. Goodbye.
